reason: The report states that hospital operating rooms require around-the-clock staffing, meaning junior technicians are frequently relegated to evenings, nights, or variable rotations. Highly desirable daytime shifts (such as 7 AM to 3 PM) are typically dependent on union seniority to secure. Furthermore, most positions mandate significant night and weekend on-call duties to cover emergency surgeries, making purely daytime hours difficult to guarantee for newer staff.
